scope: press media crawling, publishing, Supabase-to-D1/R2 migration

currentEvidence.finding: Stores body_html, thumbnail and images URL strings in CockroachDB. It does not store image binaries.
Reuploads body images through serverUploadImageUrl before article creation.
Reuploads body images and thumbnail candidates before draft/import.
Generates SQL and media manifest only. No image bytes are copied at this step.
Downloads source URLs and PUTs to R2 only when --apply is passed.
articles_total=5, articles_active=0, articles_deleted=5, active image refs=0

risks.title: Supabase remains the default media provider
risks.impact: When Supabase quota restriction is lifted, new press images may consume Supabase Storage again.
risks.mitigation: Set MEDIA_STORAGE_PROVIDER=r2 and complete R2 public URL configuration before live auto-publishing.

risks.title: R2 copy can run without a size forecast
risks.impact: Unexpected large media copy can make migration slow or exceed the intended low-cost operating envelope.

risks.title: Government site UI icons can enter article bodies
risks.impact: Bad article body quality and unnecessary upload attempts.
risks.mitigation: Use the shared press image policy to filter icons, logos, buttons, RSS and tracking images.

risks.title: Article body images had no practical upload cap
risks.impact: Single article can create many storage objects.
risks.mitigation: Default to at most 3 upload candidates per press article.

risks.title: Empty .env.vercel.local Cloudflare token can override local token in some loaders
risks.impact: Read-only D1 checks or migration scripts can fail unexpectedly.
risks.mitigation: Remove empty secret placeholders or make loaders ignore empty values.

implementedChanges.change: Added shared press image filtering, managed URL detection, upload limit and empty wrapper cleanup.
Extracted images now pass through the shared press image policy.
Korea.kr article image filtering now uses the shared press image policy.
Manual press image reupload now filters noisy images and limits upload candidates.
Auto press publishing now filters noisy images, limits upload candidates and avoids reuploading managed media URLs.
Added HEAD-based media budget forecast before R2 copy.
Migration rehearsal now includes media budget estimation when a media manifest is generated.

migrationRunbook.title: Export Supabase after quota access returns
Prepare D1 import and media manifest
Apply R2 media copy after review

nextBacklog.title: Block live publish when media provider is Supabase during R2 migration mode
Send daily D1/R2 usage report through Telegram
Show selected/filtered image candidates in press import admin UI
Generate retry command from failed R2 copy report
Deduplicate copied media by content hash after first migration
